description_long: This object is a large, rectangular stone block with a hollowed-out interior, resembling a trough or planter. The exterior surface is rough and speckled, typical of granite or similar stone, and the block has thick, solid walls. The interior cavity is deep and rectangular, with a small notch or drainage feature visible on one of the shorter sides. The block's edges are straight and sharply defined, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance. There are no visible engravings, markings, or decorative elements, and the stone appears uniform in color and texture. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for outdoor urban environments.
description: A large, rectangular, hollow stone block with rough, speckled surfaces and a deep interior cavity. It features thick walls and a small notch on one short side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, open cavity and thick stone walls, with a small notch visible on the right edge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cavity and the notch centered on the near edge.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but the notch is now on the left edge, and the interior cavity is visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the uninterrupted stone wall and the depth of the hollow interior.
attribute_installation_method: set in place on a leveled concrete or compacted gravel base
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surface appears clean and uniformly rough, with no moss, chips, or discoloration.
